title: Race Condition UAF in amdgpu_cs_wait_fences_ioctl
description_snippet:
**Steps to reproduce the problem:**   
VULNERABILITY DETAILS  
  
**Problem Description:**   
ioctl$DRM_IOCTL_AMDGPU_WAIT_FENCES will call \*\*amdgpu_cs_wait_all_fences\*\* . in amdgpu_cs_wait_all_fences , it will call  \*\*amdgpu_cs_get_fence\*\* to get a \*\*struct dma_fence\*\*  object , as a han
